title: Pricing validation — 5 customer discovery calls
acceptance_criteria: At least 5 recorded or note-backed discovery calls with candidate buyers
Candidates sourced from: Bittensor Discord, r/algotrading, X/Twitter DMs, existing network

Each call 20-30 minutes; minimum questions asked: (1) what do you pay today for trading signals / alpha data, (2) what tool do you use and what is the #1 pain, (3) if we offered $49/mo for real-time multi-strategy AI signals, what makes you pay vs pass, (4) what would make you pay $199/mo instead, (5) what would we have to do for you to stop paying the tool you use today
Quotes logged verbatim where possible in docs/gtm/pricing-interviews.md
Synthesis section at top of doc: is $49/$199 right? too high? too low? what features did buyers actually want that we do not have?
Go/no-go recommendation: does the pricing hold, shift, or blow up the roadmap
user_driven_note: This task requires live conversations and cannot be delegated to an agent. Agent can help draft outreach messages and interview scripts if asked.
